questions.q: Which major VPN provider stated it would consider leaving Canada over the federal government's proposed lawful access bill (Bill C-22)?
B.C. Premier David Eby accused Ottawa of rewarding Alberta's 'bad behaviour' after an agreement was made to advance what type of infrastructure project?
Canadians who registered for a class-action settlement began receiving bank account payouts in May 2026 related to the price-fixing of which grocery item?
Governor General Mary Simon approved the termination of two Order of Canada appointments, including Jacques Lamarre and which other former honouree convicted of crimes in Nepal?
Mark Carney and Alberta Premier Danielle Smith reached an energy agreement that could see the start of construction on what major project by 2027?
options: An oil pipeline to the West Coast
A high-speed rail link to Calgary
questions.correctText: An oil pipeline to the West Coast
